title: lycopodium hippurideum var. montanum
intro: Lycopodium hippurideum var. montanum, also known as club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceous family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting respiratory health. Lycopodium hippurideum var. montanum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, teas, and salves, which are used to treat various health conditions.
